mechanical_verdict: EXACT_CORE_CLAIM_GATE (H1-H6) DOES NOT EXIST (unrun); QUALITATIVE_LITERATURE_AUDIT EXISTS; H7-H12 artifacts publicly withheld -> expected SOURCE_BLOCKED

canonical_name: Claim dependency graph + free-parameter (lower-bound search) receipt
research_question: How many free parameters does the reading carry, and is the *301=/na/ -> n-w-y inference circular?
mechanical_verdict: Load-bearing circularity e2->e3->e4: *301 value chosen so na-wa-ya yields n-w-y, then n-w-y offered as evidence for the value. 5/6 signs are conventional LB transfer (score 0); entire novel content = single unanchored parameter *301=/na/
data_sources+corpus_version: Di Mino Fig.1; GORILA/Ventris LB transfer values; Semitic lexica
source_dependencies: e1 LB transfer (shared-source, not discovery); e5 Semitic lexica (external); e2-e4/e7-e9 Di Mino (none independent)
effective_n+independence_unit: lower-bound search receipt: >=55 values x >=4 segmentations x >=1000 roots/lang x >=6 languages x >=3 glosses; author-stated ~100,000 simulations (published multiplicity)
features_channels: premise->conclusion dependency edges; independence class; selected-to-fit flag; held-out flag; circularity risk
algorithm_model: manual dependency-graph construction (e1-e10) + lower-bound multiplicity receipt
search_space+params: k = free params asserted (the *301 value + correspondence rules) checked vs U_floor (MDL cap)
heldout_design: identifies the mechanical break: does /na/ specifically produce recurring Semitic morphology on held-out inscriptions above the deflated bar
multiplicity_correction: E[max_Neff] (DSR) bar must absorb both the logged N_eff and the author's stated ~10^5 simulations
primary_metric+value: novel_fraction 1/6 signs (per E: 34/35 signs conventional; novel_fraction 0.0286); author-stated sims ~100000
uncertainty: lower bound only (author search log unobservable)
ablations_robustness: NOT_APPLICABLE
contamination_leakage: e9 'Linear A is Semitic' from one word = forbidden language-ID; flagged
strongest_authorized_claim: The claim rides one unanchored free parameter and an internally circular value<->root inference
forbidden_stronger_claim: Cannot select /na/ because it makes N-W-Y then validate N-W-Y from that /na/
limitations_blockers: true multiplicity exceeds the logged lower bound and the author's ~10^5
supersession_relations: grounds families A/B/C break design

canonical_name: Frozen preregistration of H1-H12 with success/null/failure thresholds
research_question: What are the frozen, pre-outcome success/failure/NO_POWER thresholds and held-out partitions for each of H1-H12?
mechanical_verdict: Frozen 2026-07-08 before any outcome observed; content-hashed sha 8b098a4c; primary statistic S_morph; deflation E[max_Neff]; gate GRADUATE iff DSR>=0.95 AND k<=U_floor; thresholds FROZEN, no post-hoc adjustment
data_sources+corpus_version: defines derivation set (IOZa2/TLZa1/i-*301 core) vs held-out set (non-derivation LF carriers + admin tablets + multi-attestation forms)
source_dependencies: comparison-layer.md §A-C scoring design
effective_n+independence_unit: grouping unit = inscription; CV unit = peak-sanctuary site (5-fold); NO_POWER if <~3 independent held-out *301 forms

search_space+params: H1-H6 core + H7-H12 extended; each with pre-declared success/null/failure/NO_POWER clauses

heldout_design: leave-target-out (remove A-TA-I-*301-WA-JA), leave-site-out, leave-form-out; no site/form/edition in both partitions

canonical_name: Segmentation comparison of A-TA-I-*301-WA-JA across 6 families (branching-entropy / Viterbi-MDL / distributional recurrence)
research_question: Does any value-free segmentation family reproduce Di Mino's *301-WA-JA root boundary, or is that boundary phonetically motivated (chosen to make na-wa-ja = n-w-y)?
mechanical_verdict: DECISIVE AGAINST the *301-WA-JA root cut: no value-free family isolates it as a unit; boundary b3 (before *301) fwd branching-entropy 0.00 (A-TA-I is always followed by *301 = most anti-boundary position); Viterbi/MDL keeps the word whole (cost 5.8845 nats); root boundary is phonetically motivated -> corroborates e2->e3->e4 circularity
data_sources+corpus_version: silver corpus distributional recurrence (this audit); target A-TA-I-*301-WA-JA (11 attestations)
source_dependencies: DI_MINO Fig.1; DAVIS 2014 (i-*301 unit, exact paper not in-repo -> flagged); THOMAS reduced-boundary (source not in-repo -> flagged); GORILA diplomatic
effective_n+independence_unit: 5 internal boundary positions; corpus-wide substring occurrence counts
features_channels: forward/backward branching-entropy (bits); substring recurrence (left/right occurrences); Viterbi MDL cost (nats)
algorithm_model: 6 families: DI_MINO, DAVIS, THOMAS, DIPLOMATIC, NO_PHONETIC_STRUCTURAL (data-determined), PROBABILISTIC (branching-entropy + Viterbi/MDL)
search_space+params: internal boundaries b1-b5; pairwise Jaccard boundary agreement across all family pairs
segmentation: THE object of study; Di Mino boundaries [1,2,3] isolate *301-WA-JA; NO_PHONETIC_STRUCTURAL cuts [3,4,5] (b4 AFTER *301); PROBABILISTIC cuts [1,5]
heldout_design: distributional edges scored corpus-wide, not on the single target
positive+negative_controls: value-free families act as the negative control against the phonetically-motivated cut
primary_metric+value: b3 fwd branching-entropy 0.0 bits (support 13); b4 boundary_score 0.7825; Viterbi total_cost 5.8845 nats, 0 internal boundaries; Di Mino vs NO_PHONETIC_STRUCTURAL Jaccard 0.2; Di Mino vs Thomas Jaccard 0.0
ablations_robustness: two independent value-free methods (recurrence + branching-entropy/Viterbi) both fail to reproduce the root unit
contamination_leakage: NOT_APPLICABLE
strongest_authorized_claim: No value-free segmentation reproduces Di Mino's *301-WA-JA root boundary; it is phonetically motivated
forbidden_stronger_claim: Cannot present the root cut as distributionally supported
limitations_blockers: edge reference is a structural benchmark not ground truth
supersession_relations: corroborates T02 circularity; feeds MORPH_ROOT refutation in family C

canonical_name: Family A — exhaustive *301 value audit (H1: *301=/na/)
research_question: Is /na/ specifically supported for *301 over the full admissible value space on held-out S_morph/S_lex, surviving leave-target/site/form-out and the deflated bar?
method_family: exhaustive sign-value sweep + permutation null + multiplicity deflation
mechanical_verdict: REJECT. Primary S_morph value-INVARIANT (identical 0.2738 under any relabelling) = NO_DISCRIMINATIVE_POWER_FOR_VALUE (not itself a rejection). On S_lex /na/ ranks 21/65 (20 strictly better, 30 tied; 49th percentile of Packard null; deflated 0.0); leave-target-out rank 21; leave-site/form-out never rank 1 (range 6-26). #1 only on weakest S_phono by negligible 0.095-nat margin. Fails E[max_Neff] over 260 logged cells AND author 10^5
data_sources+corpus_version: libation_formula_exact/corpus.json (36 attest); Ugaritic uga-heb.gold.cog consonant skeletons (1936 forms, eps_NED 0.34)
source_dependencies: corpus T04; Ugaritic lexicon; conventional LB values grade benchmarks only (non-circular)
effective_n+independence_unit: N_eff = 260 logged (65 values x 4 segmentations) cells; author-stated 100000 sims; independence unit = inscription/site; power ADEQUATE (32 held-out forms)
features_channels: S_morph (recurring-morphology, primary), S_lex (lexical), S_phono (phonotactic)
algorithm_model: full CV grid (13 onsets x 5 vowels = 65) + NULL logogram; rank /na/ vs Packard frequency-banded sign-value permutation null
search_space+params: 65 candidate values + NULL; 4 segmentations; leave-target-out, leave-site-out (13 sites), leave-form-out (23 forms)
segmentation: 4 segmentations; whole-word S_lex variant reported (rank 21, tied 15)
candidate_languages_hypotheses: value space subsumes every CV literature proposal; *301 has NO external AB anchor for any value
positive+negative_controls: PC3 planted *301-style value recovered rank 1/113 (calibration, separate instance); Packard permutation = negative null
null_family+run_count: Packard frequency-banded permutation; null_mean_packard S_lex 0.7517; na null_percentile 49.0
multiplicity_correction: E[max_null] over logged cells 0.8333 and over author sims 0.8333; na_clears_Emax = FALSE (0.667 < 0.833)
primary_metric+value: S_morph 0.27380952 (value-invariant, z=6.95); S_lex /na/ 0.6667 rank 21/65; deflated_na 0.0; S_phono /na/ -2.0015 rank 1/65 margin 0.095
uncertainty: p_rank ~0.0033; 30 values tied at /na/ rank on S_lex
power: ADEQUATE — 32 held-out forms; S_morph z=6.95 has_power true
ablations_robustness: leave-target-out unchanged (rank 21); leave-site-out never rank 1; whole-segmentation variant rank 21
contamination_leakage: non-circular: known LB values grade benchmark only; independent red flag (report E): /na/ already written 158x by standard NA sign (AB06)
strongest_authorized_claim: /na/ is NOT specifically supported over alternatives; S_morph cannot discriminate any value
forbidden_stronger_claim: Any claim about the language; treating S_morph invariance as a rejection of /na/ specifically
limitations_blockers: S_morph structurally value-invariant (relabel-invariant) -> the H1 REJECT rests on S_lex + combined gate
supersession_relations: corroborated by segmentation T05 and morphology C; core of DI_MINO_CORE_VERDICT

canonical_name: Family B — Semitic root existence search-null (H2: A-TA-I-*301-WA-JA contains N-W-Y)
research_question: Is the N-W-Y root a specific, exceptional consequence of /na/, or a generic outcome of a family-wide weak-root search over admissible *301 onsets?
mechanical_verdict: REJECT — root existence is a generic search outcome: 31% (strict n-w-y) to 77% (weak+hollow collapse) of admissible *301 C1 onsets hit a real Semitic root; under weak collapse only onset n reaches a dwell-tier gloss, and only via a III-y->III-h transform + selecting Hebrew/Aramaic over yod-matching Arabic/Ugaritic
data_sources+corpus_version: BDB-cited B1 root table (Hebrew nwh, Aramaic nwh, Akkadian nw', Ugaritic nwy, Arabic nwy, Phoenician blocked); 6 admitted Semitic languages
source_dependencies: Semitic lexica (BDB, Strong, Klein, KB, CAD, Lane, Wehr, DUL, etc.); external/real
effective_n+independence_unit: 13 admissible C1 onsets; logged_root_gloss_search_cells 7800 = values x collapses x languages x segmentations; author ~100000
features_channels: root_existence_rate; dwell_tier_hit_rate; exact_or_near_rate; per-onset roots hit
algorithm_model: enumerate 13 onsets x 3 collapse modes (strict / weak / weak+hollow); check real Semitic root existence + gloss tier
search_space+params: 65 values; 6 languages; 5 consonant collapses incl hollow; 4 segmentations; ~1500 triconsonantal roots/lang; 3.63 mean gloss senses/root
segmentation: vowel-strip na-wa-ya -> n-w-y (the reading's own segmentation)
heldout_design: H2 held-out recurrence tested in family C/D (root recurs 0/3 divergent held-out sites)
positive+negative_controls: PC1 Ugaritic->Hebrew recovers real cognates (separate); dwelling-field prior: 13 distinct Semitic roots carry a dwell-tier gloss
null_family+run_count: value-null across 13 onsets x 3 collapse modes; best-of-language
multiplicity_correction: P(>=1 dwell hit over logged 7800 cells) = 1.0; over author 10^5 = 1.0
primary_metric+value: strict root_existence_rate 0.3077 / weak 0.5385 / weak+hollow 0.7692; strict dwell_tier_hit_rate 0.0; weak/weakhollow dwell_tier_hit_rate 0.0769; best-of-language P(dwell) 0.75
uncertainty: SOURCE_UNCERTAIN for Ugaritic nwy 'drive-away' (not counted in load-bearing tiers)
ablations_robustness: 3 collapse regimes; remove either the y->h collapse or the Hebrew/Aramaic language choice and 'dwell' evaporates
contamination_leakage: non-circular; language cherry-pick charged
strongest_authorized_claim: A matching Semitic weak root existing is a density property of tertiae-infirmae/hollow roots, not evidence for /na/
forbidden_stronger_claim: Uncorrected broad-root match; claiming a historical Semitic relationship is universally impossible (NOT made)
limitations_blockers: root existence rests on the BDB-cited B1 table, not on the edit-distance statistic
supersession_relations: pairs with B-Lfake channel and B-gloss (H3); feeds end-to-end null NULL_PUBLISHED

canonical_name: Family B — L_fake / Packard edit-distance 'match-exists' channel canary (S_lex power test)
research_question: Does the edit-distance 'a near-match to n-w-y exists in the lexicon' channel carry any discriminative power, or is a near-match guaranteed in any dense Semitic-shaped lexicon?
mechanical_verdict: NO_POWER — the L_fake INVENTED lexicon already contains a near-match to n-w-y ~100% of the time (floor mean 1.0); Packard-permuted (destroyed-correspondence) control ~0.98; so the 'match-exists' channel reads search-attractiveness, not cognacy. Root existence rests on the BDB-cited table, NOT this statistic
data_sources+corpus_version: n_hebrew_lexicon 2767; 48 L_fake invented lexica; eps_NED 0.34; n_target_forms 1
source_dependencies: scripts/comparison/lfake.py, run_canary.py (parent machinery)
effective_n+independence_unit: 2000 realizations (reconstructed); frozen canary values
features_channels: S_lex (normalized edit-distance match rate)
algorithm_model: score target skeleton vs real Hebrew lexicon, vs L_fake invented lexicon, vs frequency/length-matched random real, vs Packard-permuted
search_space+params: eps_NED 0.34; 48 fake lexica; 2000 realizations
positive+negative_controls: gold cognate wordlist returns 0.0 (under-covers bare roots); L_fake = the >= real floor
primary_metric+value: s_lex_Lfake mean 1.0 (sd 0.0); Packard-permuted mean 0.9792 (frozen) / 0.99 (reconstructed); s_lex_real_hebrew 0.0; freq-len-matched random 0.0
uncertainty: reconstructed vs frozen-canary values agree (~0.99 vs 1.00)
ablations_robustness: reconstruction reconfirms high floor under dense-root regime
contamination_leakage: NOT_APPLICABLE
strongest_authorized_claim: The edit-distance match channel is NO_POWER; near-matches to n-w-y are guaranteed in any dense Semitic lexicon
forbidden_stronger_claim: Cannot cite a 'match exists' statistic as evidence of cognacy
limitations_blockers: gold cognate list under-covers bare roots (returns 0.0)
supersession_relations: supports B-root-search-null; edit-distance NO_POWER cited in end-to-end null

canonical_name: Family B — gloss specificity + formula-feature prediction (H3: gloss 'dwell')
research_question: Does the gloss 'dwell' predict independently observable libation-formula features better than give/dedicate/invoke, a neutral placeholder, and the wrong-gloss control (intend)?
mechanical_verdict: REJECT — 'dwell' scores 0.0/3 on observable formula features (F1 precedes theonym-recipient, F2 dedicatory libation context, F3 transitive object slot), at/below the neutral placeholder (0) and below give/dedicate (3.0), invoke (2.5), and even random-gloss expected 1.8; 'dwell' is inexact under frozen rules (final yod vs Hebrew final he) and language-cherry-picked
data_sources+corpus_version: libation-formula frame features; predeclared machine-readable gloss tiers (exact/near/broad/unrelated)
source_dependencies: B1 root table (glosses); formula context (JA-SA-SA-RA-ME theonym prior)
effective_n+independence_unit: 3 formula features; 1 target word (diagnostic, no bilingual ground truth)
features_channels: F1 theonym-recipient, F2 dedicatory context, F3 transitive slot
algorithm_model: score each candidate gloss 0-3 across F1-F3; compare to neutral placeholder + wrong-gloss control (intend = Arabic n-w-y real gloss)
search_space+params: gloss tiers (5 exact / 10 near / 13 broad); candidate glosses {dwell, give, dedicate, invoke, intend, NEUTRAL}
heldout_design: diagnostic (no held-out; no bilingual ground truth explicitly noted)
multiplicity_correction: dwelling-field prior: 13 distinct Semitic roots carry a dwell-tier gloss (high-prior)
primary_metric+value: dwell 0.0/3; give 3.0; dedicate 3.0; invoke 2.5; intend 0.5; neutral 0.0; random-gloss expected 1.8
ablations_robustness: dwell below both rivals and random baseline
contamination_leakage: III-y->III-h correspondence charged to the receipt (unregistered)
strongest_authorized_claim: 'dwell' is one of many admissible glosses and underperforms rival dedicatory readings on observable features
forbidden_stronger_claim: Claiming 'dwell' is specifically supported; claiming the etymology is universally impossible
limitations_blockers: no bilingual = no ground truth; diagnostic
supersession_relations: with B-root and B-Lfake completes H2/H3 = NULL_PUBLISHED in end-to-end null

canonical_name: Family C — exact morphology / paradigm audit + head-to-head + known-script controls (H5)
research_question: Does the exact Semitic parse (A=1cs / TA=tG stem / I=stem-vowel / *301-WA-JA=root) recur across independent held-out forms and predict them better than Davis/Thomas/neutral-agglutinative/Markov models?
method_family: morphological productivity + leave-target-out paradigm prediction + known-script controls
mechanical_verdict: REJECT. MORPH_ROOT REFUTED (sign after *301 varies WA/U/TI/DE; *301-WA-JA recurs only in target copies +A-NA-TI-*301-WA-JA; 0 held-out recurrence). PARADIGM REJECT (target-template predicts its own invariant root in 1/6 held-out). Head-to-head: Davis I-*301 0.833 (best) beats Di Mino root 0.167 (worst); Thomas -JA/-E 0.50. SEMITIC_MORPHOLOGY NOT_SUPPORTED. MORPH_A/MORPH_TA survive only at L3 as generic onset/affix presence, favouring Davis
data_sources+corpus_version: 3147 LA words; 36 *301 records; 17 invocation-slot records; corpus T04
source_dependencies: Davis 2014 (I-*301 stem); Thomas (-JA/-E ending); Ugaritic; synthetic corpora
effective_n+independence_unit: 6 non-target held-out invocation forms; S_morph held-out invocation across 6 independent inscriptions
features_channels: affix productivity (S_morph); slot occupancy; held-out invariant-unit fraction; Markov next-sign top-1
algorithm_model: concatenative-affix productivity gate (morphostat) + leave-target-out template + head-to-head invariant-unit test (Di Mino/Davis/Thomas/neutral-agglu/Semitic-weakroot) + Markov1/2 baselines
search_space+params: MORPH_A/TA/I/ROOT slots; C2 paradigm; C3 head-to-head 5 models; C4 6 known-script controls
candidate_languages_hypotheses: Semitic root-and-pattern vs Davis/Thomas structural vs neutral agglutinative
heldout_design: leave-target-out (fraction of non-target held-out invocation forms containing each model's invariant unit)
positive+negative_controls: C4 controls: Ugaritic z=15.23 (fires), synthetic Semitic z=25.19, synthetic agglutinative z=11.11, opaque LB z=36.52 (all have power); LA_invocation has_power=FALSE (m=1<3, too sparse)
multiplicity_correction: report MORPH_A/TA/I/ROOT/PARADIGM/SEMITIC_MORPHOLOGY separately; one supported slot does not validate the parse
primary_metric+value: Di Mino root heldout_invariance 0.1667 (1/6); Davis I-*301 0.8333 (5/6); Thomas 0.5 (3/6); Markov1 top1 0.111; Markov2 0.083; S_morph heldout invocation 0.2778 z=13.10
uncertainty: MORPH_I '14 attestations' inflated by 11 identical target copies
power: MORPH detector has power on controls (z 11-36); LA_invocation NO_POWER (m=1)
ablations_robustness: 5 rival morphological models + 2 Markov orders + 6 known-script controls
contamination_leakage: non-circular (leave-target-out, sign-level); Semitic morphology detector cannot distinguish Semitic from agglutinative from edge affixes
licence_earned: L3 structural only (generic onset/affix); no L7 grammatical licence
strongest_authorized_claim: The exact Semitic parse is not supported; a Davis-style I-*301 stem predicts the held-out paradigm far better
forbidden_stronger_claim: 1cs/tG/stem-vowel grammatical (L7) readings; 'Semitic morphology' recovered on held-out LA
limitations_blockers: LA invocation set is a near-frozen formula lexeme with too few distinct stems
supersession_relations: corroborates A + segmentation; MORPH_ROOT refutation aligns with T05

canonical_name: Family D — leave-one-site-out formula prediction (H4 function / H6 regional paradigm)
research_question: Does Di Mino's system predict held-out regional formula forms + the verb slot + *301 behaviour above frequency/template/Markov/Davis baselines under leave-one-site-out?
mechanical_verdict: NO_POWER — Di Mino's exact-form prediction is IDENTICAL to the frequency/template/structural/Davis baseline at every held-out site (no regional-variation generator); effective independent discriminating sites = 3, at/below the NO_POWER floor (3); every clean divergent form is a unique single-source singleton unpredictable by any leave-one-out model. Also H2 root recurs 0/3 on clean divergent held-out sites (REFUTED)
data_sources+corpus_version: 8 peak-sanctuary sites; 6 clean non-derivation sites; 7 distinct forms; corpus T04
source_dependencies: corpus T04; Davis/template/Markov baselines
effective_n+independence_unit: effective_independent_discriminating_sites 3; effective_site_components_by_shared_form 5; unit = peak-sanctuary site
features_channels: exact-form top-1 accuracy; root recurrence; slot occupancy; boundary F1 vs edge-ref
algorithm_model: LOSO with 5 models (M_freq, M_tmpl, M_markov, M_davis, M_dimino); random-Semitic null (100000 draws)
search_space+params: 8 sites held out one at a time; candidate universe 7 forms
segmentation: boundary F1 scored vs data-driven branching-entropy edge reference (structural benchmark, not ground truth)
candidate_languages_hypotheses: Di Mino Semitic vs neutral baselines
heldout_design: leave-one-site-out; derivation sites Iouktas/Troullos excluded from clean set
primary_metric+value: exact-form top1 all sites 0.625 (identical across all 5 models); clean sites 0.5; divergent clean sites 0.0; dimino_beats_baselines = FALSE; H2 root 3/6 clean sites but 0/3 divergent clean sites
uncertainty: clean divergent forms are unpredictable singletons
power: INSUFFICIENT — 3 effective discriminating sites at NO_POWER floor
ablations_robustness: 5 models all tie; no model predicts any clean divergent form
contamination_leakage: Iouktas is a derivation site (root recurrence there is contamination-flagged)
licence_earned: none from D (H4 functional support comes from E structural, not D)
strongest_authorized_claim: The exact-form LOSO channel has zero power to separate Di Mino from neutral baselines
forbidden_stronger_claim: Claiming cross-site predictive success; treating tie-with-baseline as support
limitations_blockers: no regional generator in the claim; singleton divergent forms
supersession_relations: H2 held-out recurrence 0/3 corroborates family B/C REJECT

canonical_name: Family E — full libation-formula interpretation audit (novel-parameter accounting + homophony + word-order)
research_question: How much of the published line-1 formula translation is novel vs conventional LB transfer, and do system-level facts (word order, recurrence) require the phonetic readings?
method_family: discovery-firewall accounting + homophony diagnostic + fixed-template baseline
mechanical_verdict: REJECT (one-novel-parameter): 34/35 signs of the line are conventional LB transliteration (literature_match, score 0); exactly one novel parameter *301=/na/. Only word 1 has a published morpheme table; words 2-8 SOURCE_BLOCKED. Homophony red flag: /na/ already written 158x by standard NA (AB06), incl. same IOZa2 line. Word order recovered by neutral FIXED_TEMPLATE (order_consistency 1.0, 12/12) with zero phonetic input
data_sources+corpus_version: IOZa2 formula line1 (8 words, 35 signs); corpus T04
source_dependencies: GORILA/Ventris LB transfer values; Di Mino Fig.1 (word 1 only)
effective_n+independence_unit: 35 signs; 8 formula words; 12 LF carriers with >=2 slots
features_channels: sign class (KNOWN_AB_TRANSFER / LINEAR_A_ONLY_NEW); novel-parameter count; NA-token homophony; slot-order consistency
algorithm_model: per-sign discovery firewall classification + homophony token count + fixed-template word-order recurrence test
search_space+params: 8 words; alternative readings enumerated (Davis/Thomas/value-free) for word 1
segmentation: word 1 alternatives incl value-free cut AFTER *301 (report 04)
candidate_languages_hypotheses: Semitic invocation verb (word 1) vs prior theonym/frame readings (Asasarame etc.)
heldout_design: word-order recurrence tested across 12 multi-slot carriers
positive+negative_controls: neutral FIXED_TEMPLATE model as baseline for word order
primary_metric+value: novel_parameters 1; conventional_LB_transfer_signs 34; novel_fraction 0.0286; standard NA tokens 158 vs *301 tokens 31; word-order order_consistency_rate 1.0 (12/12)
ablations_robustness: system-level prediction audit: word order/recurrence/regional variants all value-free
contamination_leakage: homophony argument is independent structural evidence AGAINST *301=/na/
licence_earned: L3 structural (invocation-verb slot is a value-free structural marker); no phonetic/lexical licence
strongest_authorized_claim: The complete system is not publicly specified; only *301 is novel and no system-level fact requires the phonetic readings
forbidden_stronger_claim: Treating word-order/recurrence recovery as evidence for the readings; reading words 2-8 (SOURCE_BLOCKED)
limitations_blockers: words 2-8 SOURCE_BLOCKED
supersession_relations: supplies the homophony flag cited in the final verdict; H4 PARTIAL_SUPPORT at L3

canonical_name: Positive/negative controls PC1-PC6 + PCNP (pipeline calibration)
research_question: Is the scoring pipeline calibrated — does it recover real and planted truth, reject a manufactured fake, distinguish morphology types, and abstain when degraded?
mechanical_verdict: PASS — pipeline CALIBRATED. PC1 Ugaritic->Hebrew recovered (0.780 vs L_fake floor 0.357); PC2 opaque LB->Greek Ventris recovered (0.923 vs permuted p95 0.385, 2.7x); PC3 planted *301-style value recovered rank 1/113 (margin 0.963); PC4 manufactured-fake Semitic REJECTED; PC5 agglutinative fires (z 28.79); PC6 Semitic-prefix fires (z 14.41); PCNP degraded returns NO_POWER (m=2<3)
data_sources+corpus_version: Ugaritic<->Hebrew cognates; opaque LB 918 forms/1402 Greek lexemes/69 LB signs; planted sign 82 attestations/value space 113; synthetic corpora
source_dependencies: scripts/comparison machinery (lfake, lexstat, morphostat); DAMOS LB
effective_n+independence_unit: 7 controls; per-control corpora as above
features_channels: S_lex (PC1-4), S_morph (PC5/6/NP)
algorithm_model: same gate applied to known-answer scenarios (recover real / recover planted / reject fake / distinguish morphology / abstain)
search_space+params: PC3 value space 113; PC4 82 random forms; PC5/6 30 groups
positive+negative_controls: THIS IS the control battery; PC4 = negative (must reject), PCNP = abstention (must NO_POWER)
null_family+run_count: L_fake floor, permuted-map null, search-deflated null per control
multiplicity_correction: PC3 search_deflated_null_p95 0.0; true clears deflated null
primary_metric+value: PC1 0.780 vs 0.357 floor (margin 0.392); PC2 0.9227 vs p95 0.3845 (2.7x); PC3 rank 1/113 s_lex 1.0 margin 0.963; PC4 best fake 0.0 (rejected); PC5 z=28.79; PC6 z=14.41 (recovers m/n/t/y prefixes); PCNP no power
uncertainty: L_fake floor >0 and < positive benchmark in every recover control
power: confirmed on controls; degraded case correctly returns NO_POWER
ablations_robustness: 6 distinct control scenarios + abstention case
contamination_leakage: NOT_APPLICABLE (controls)
strongest_authorized_claim: The pipeline recovers real+planted truth and rejects fakes -> a null-indistinguishable Di Mino result is a GENUINE negative, not a dead detector
forbidden_stronger_claim: Cannot claim Di Mino REJECT without this PASS (verdict is conditional on PC success)
limitations_blockers: none material
supersession_relations: makes families A/B and end-to-end null interpretable as genuine negatives

canonical_name: End-to-end adaptive null programme + whole-pipeline false-positive rate
research_question: Under the full adaptive best-of-{value, segmentation, weak-collapse, language, gloss} pipeline, how often does the null manufacture a chain at least as strong as /na/->N-W-Y->'dwell'?
mechanical_verdict: End-to-end FP rate = 1.0; search-adjusted p ~ 1.0. Best-of-search manufactures a coherent real-root exact-tier reading on essentially every null run (per-random-value root existence 0.769). Even with 'dwell' pre-committed, a dwell-tier hit is CERTAIN over the 7,800 logged root/gloss cells (1.0). 10/13 admissible onsets already yield a real Semitic weak/hollow root with a citable gloss. Lexical/gloss legs (H2/H3) = NULL_PUBLISHED; edit-distance channel NO_POWER; S_morph NO_DISCRIMINATIVE_POWER; because PC passed, this is a genuine negative
data_sources+corpus_version: 13 onset outcomes (enumerable value space); Semitic root/gloss lexica; corpus T04
source_dependencies: families A/B; PC calibration
effective_n+independence_unit: realization budget cheap 2000 / moderate 800 / full 200; enumerable 13-onset value space -> exact rates + MC CI
features_channels: value leg (S_lex per onset), root/gloss leg (root existence + gloss tier), morph leg (S_morph), stochastic legs (L_fake/Packard)
algorithm_model: adaptive best-of-search across value+segmentation+weak-collapse+language+gloss; Monte-Carlo random-uniform + frequency-matched value draws (N=200)
search_space+params: 13 onsets; logged 7800 root/gloss cells; N_eff value x segmentation 260; author sims 100000
null_family+run_count: adaptive best-of-search null; Monte-Carlo N=200 (random-uniform + frequency-matched); 2000 stochastic realizations
multiplicity_correction: search-adjusted p over logged root/gloss freedoms; E_max over logged 0.833; na does not clear
primary_metric+value: PRIMARY best-of-search FP 1.0; per-random-value 0.7692 (Wilson95 0.497-0.918); conservative dwell per-value 0.0769, best-of-language 0.75, over-logged-search 1.0; MC random-uniform M_gloss_fixed_dwell 0.06, frequency-matched 0.105
uncertainty: Wilson 95% CIs reported; exact rates over enumerable value space
power: value channel HAS power (PC3 rank 1/113); na fails rank-1 clause; H2 held-out recurrence fails; H3 beats-features fails
ablations_robustness: free-target vs pre-committed-dwell both null; strict/weak/weakhollow collapse regimes
contamination_leakage: the observed chain sits INSIDE the null band on lexical/gloss legs
strongest_authorized_claim: The lexical/gloss chain is indistinguishable from the fake/root-search null; search-adjusted significance is nil
forbidden_stronger_claim: Claiming a historical Semitic relationship is universally impossible; treating S_morph invariance as a value rejection
limitations_blockers: edit-distance channel is NO_POWER; root existence rests on BDB table not the statistic
supersession_relations: closes the gate -> DI_MINO_CORE_VERDICT = REJECT

canonical_name: Final mechanical adjudication — DI_MINO_CORE_VERDICT + extended verdicts
research_question: Combining H1-H6 + controls + end-to-end null under the frozen verdict rule, what is the mechanical core verdict and the highest earned claim layer?
mechanical_verdict: DI_MINO_CORE_VERDICT = REJECT. Chain *301=/na/->N-W-Y->'dwell'->Semitic fails >=3 load-bearing clauses (value rank-1, H2 held-out recurrence 0/3, H3 beats-features 0/3) on a PC-calibrated pipeline; end-to-end FP=1.0. H1 REJECT; H2 REJECT; H3 REJECT; H4 PARTIAL_SUPPORT (L3 functional = mainstream Davis/Thomas, not Di Mino's novelty); H5 REJECT; H6 NO_POWER; H7-H12 SOURCE_BLOCKED. Scope: rejects the CHAIN, not the structural i-*301 core or etymology-in-principle; III-y->III-h transform charged; no impossibility claimed. Highest earned layer L3 functional; no transfer licence
data_sources+corpus_version: aggregates families A-H + PC + end-to-end null; parent main@6fd4f20; paper byte-frozen a2ab89fa
source_dependencies: all prior instances in this campaign
effective_n+independence_unit: logged N_eff 260 (value x seg) + 7800 root/gloss cells + author 10^5
features_channels: composite of S_morph / S_lex / S_phono / root-existence / gloss-feature / cross-site / end-to-end FP
algorithm_model: frozen verdict rule GRADUATE/PARTIAL_SUPPORT/REJECT/NULL_PUBLISHED/NO_POWER; no LLM grading
search_space+params: H1-H12 sub-claim matrix
multiplicity_correction: E[max_Neff] over logged + author 10^5; gate false-graduation 0.6%
primary_metric+value: fails >=3 load-bearing clauses; end-to-end FP 1.0; search-adjusted p ~1.0; highest earned layer L3
uncertainty: 3 verdict-framing safeguards bind scope (S_morph = NO_DISCRIMINATIVE_POWER not rejection; weak-radical = unregistered III-y->III-h; reject CHAIN not i-*301 core)
ablations_robustness: value S_morph NO_POWER + value S_lex REJECT + H2/H3 NULL_PUBLISHED converge
contamination_leakage: append-only (Art. XVII); paper + prior history untouched; qualitative audit reproduced/cited not altered; no LLM graded
licence_earned: L3 functional/structural only (value-free i-*301 residue = mainstream reading); no phonetic/lexical/semantic/language-ID layer; no transfer licence
strongest_authorized_claim: The specific /na/->N-W-Y->'dwell'->Semitic chain is REJECTED; only the value-free i-*301 structural core + invocation-slot function survive (mainstream, not the disputed claim)
forbidden_stronger_claim: Claiming the chain rejects the structural i-*301 core; claiming a Semitic etymology is universally impossible; advancing any sign reading in LOGOS's own voice
limitations_blockers: H7-H12 SOURCE_BLOCKED remain un-adjudicated
supersession_relations: this IS the exact mechanical adjudication the paper named as missing; does not supersede/alter the qualitative audit or the frozen paper
